title: May 20th, 2022
body:
lyrics

my catalog long like the mayan calendar
you log a seven day week and can't keep it adding up
i never could either but learned to surf the noise through the ether
now i work to serve the earth i rely on
for the bed i lie on
ground i try on
lines i fly on
fabric i die on
this journey that i'm on is marked by magic
i've had it
and there's no going backwards
the words that i use to move through traffic are different
i'm speaking in tongues and they haven't been listenin
it's all this crashing and kicking, scratching and hissing
licking my wounds
til these black cats taught me make my vocals specific
don't be superstitious
if it's local, it's hitting
let me show you, my my my mind blown by the visions
i i i i been thrown since i'm spittin
cuz just like always the whole game change when you get it
living nine lives at the same time adds new dimensions to live in
wu did it, i saw it, practiced doom style
fear masking my wild parts
i groomed and gardened my smiles while the ground hardened
doom piled my feelings
it happens to trees in autumn
